documentation:
---
param bucket_arn: The ARN of the S3 bucket where you store your artifacts.
param name: '-'
param preproduction_lambda_arn: The ARN of the Lambda function for the pre-production
  account.
param production_lambda_arn: The ARN of the Lambda function for the production account.
param role_name: 'The role name for the CodePipeline CICD pipeline. Default: ''DataBrew-Recipe-Pipeline-Role'''
param scope: '-'
---

methods.name: cdk_databrew_cicd.DataBrewCodePipeline.__init__
documentation:
---
param branch_name: 'The name of the branch that will trigger the DataBrew CICD pipeline.
  Default: ''main'''
param bucket_name: 'The name of the S3 bucket for the CodePipeline DataBrew CICD pipeline.
  Default: ''databrew-cicd-codepipelineartifactstorebucket'''
param first_stage_artifact_name: 'the (required) name of the Artifact at the first
  stage. Default: ''SourceOutput'''
param name: '-'
param pipeline_name: 'The name of the CodePipeline Databrew CICD pipeline. Default:
  ''DataBrew-Recipe-Application'''
param preproduction_iam_role_arn: The ARN of the IAM role in the pre-production account.
param production_iam_role_arn: The ARN of the IAM role in the production account.
param repo_name: 'The name of the CodeCommit repositroy for the DataBrew CICD pipeline.
  Default: ''DataBrew-Recipes-Repo'''
param scope: '-'
---

methods.name: cdk_databrew_cicd.FirstCommitHandler.__init__
documentation:
---
param branch_name: The branch name used in the CodeCommit repo.
param code_commit_repo_arn: The ARN of the CodeCommit repository.
param function_name: 'The name of the Lambda function which deals with first commit
  via AWS CodeCommit. Default: ''FirstCommitHandler'''
param name: '-'
param repo_name: The name of the CodeCommit repo.
param role_name: 'The name of the IAM role for the Lambda function which deals with
  first commit via AWS CodeCommit. Default: ''LambdaForInitialCommitRole'''
param scope: '-'
---

methods.name: cdk_databrew_cicd.IamRole.__init__
documentation:
---
param account_id: The ID of your infrastructure account.
param environment: '''preproduction'' or ''production''.'
param name: '-'
param role_name: 'The role name. Default: ''\{environment}-Databrew-Cicd-Role'''
param scope: '-'
---

methods.name: cdk_databrew_cicd.IamRole.role_arn
documentation: The ARN of the IAM role for pre-production or production.

IAM Role.

Defines an IAM role for pre-production and production AWS accounts.
